response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure (DLang, microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops/talks
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production fintech contexts
Lacks demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or governing hybrid external engineering models
No visible track record in regulated financial systems, credit risk, or compliance infrastructure
